stocks.recent_news: DLF sold DLF TechPark II and 17.75-acre Kolkata land to Srijan entities for ~Rs 710 crore on 30-Mar-2026. Q3 FY26 net profit rose 13.66% YoY to Rs 1,203 crore. Stock recently in Rs 568-720 range vs 52W high Rs 886.80; analysts target ~Rs 850-950 (Strong Buy consensus). Q4 FY26 results expected around early-June 2026.
stocks.sector_context: Nifty Realty index has been among top sectoral gainers; DLF is the heavyweight at ~27.8% weightage. Peers Lodha and Prestige reported record Q4 FY26 pre-sales bookings, signalling sustained residential demand. Listed developers operating with low leverage support sector valuations.
stocks.peer_comparison: DLF leads sector by market cap (~Rs 1.85 lakh cr). PE of ~41x is stretched vs peers but debt ratio of ~0.09 is among the lowest. Recent share-price weakness has lagged Lodha and Prestige which posted record FY25 sales updates.
red_flags: Supreme Court interim order dated 25-Feb-2026 directed inquiry into The Primus project (624 apartments) - matter sub judice
Stock well below 52W high of Rs 886.80
catalysts: Q4 FY26 results and FY27 guidance (early June 2026)

stocks.recent_news: Citi cut target price to Rs 1,190 citing 20-23% EPS cuts for FY26-27, flagging API competition, margin compression, US tariff exposure, tender delays and CDSCO approval challenges; stock fell ~1.84% on the downgrade. Q3 FY26 revenue +14% YoY but 9M FY26 down ~5% on H1 weakness. Acquired Celliimune Biotech for Rs 66 lakh on 2-Apr-2026 (DNA engineering, cancer therapeutics). Raviraj Karia joined as CFO from 18-Dec-2025. Trading around Rs 1,057.
stocks.sector_context: Pharma broadly defensive after extended correction; Indian pharma volumes growing ~12% YoY. However, fermentation-based API niche faces idiosyncratic pressure from Chinese competition, US tariff overhang on a meaningful export book, slower CDSCO approvals and tender delays.
stocks.peer_comparison: Lagging large-cap pharma defensives - Citi's bearish revision contrasts with bullish/neutral views on Sun Pharma, Cipla and Dr Reddy. Q3 +14% on a soft base trails broader pharma trajectory; volatility lower than market but momentum weak.
red_flags: Citi target cut to Rs 1,190 with 20-23% EPS cuts for FY26-27
API slowdown and margin compression flagged by sell-side
US tariff exposure on export book
Tender delays and CDSCO approval challenges
catalysts: Injectables pipeline and shift to in-house manufacturing
New CFO's first FY26 commentary and FY27 guidance
Celliimune integration / DNA engineering R&D signal

stocks.recent_news: Q4 FY26 board meeting and earnings call scheduled today, 4-May-2026, at 5 PM IST; trading window closed till 8-May. Bain Capital open offer at Rs 248.29 closed 20-Apr-2026 with NIL tenders; BC Asia Investments became co-promoter on 21-Apr-2026 (Bain stake 18-41.66%; existing promoters ~28.9%). Stock surged ~12% in two sessions post-offer; trading around Rs 304 on 4-May. Q3 FY26 PAT down 14% YoY; NII -18.4%.
stocks.sector_context: Bank Nifty closed prior week down 2.19% on heavy selling. Gold-loan NBFCs under RBI lens with new gold-loan circular impacting LTV/operations. Offsetting positives: gold prices at multi-year highs (>Rs 1.4 lakh/10g) and lending-rate alignment driving expected ~40% AUM CAGR FY25-28.
stocks.peer_comparison: Trades at premium to recent levels post-Bain control change; peer Muthoot Finance similarly impacted by RBI gold-loan circular. Manappuram aligned LTV (up to 85% incl. interest) with new RBI cap, in line with peers.
red_flags: Q3 FY26 consolidated PAT -14% YoY; NII -18.4%
Earlier governance concerns flagged around CEO leave during Bain transition
Trading window closed - results event-risk today
catalysts: Q4 FY26 results and earnings call today (4-May-2026)
Possible interim dividend at today's board meeting
Bain Capital co-promoter strategic plan / next phase of growth

stocks.recent_news: Stock up ~2.8-5% on 4-May-2026 to Rs 13,837-13,976 after record April sales of 239,646 units (+33.3% YoY; domestic 191,122). Q4 FY26 results (28-Apr-2026): revenue +28% YoY to Rs 52,462 cr on all-time high quarterly volumes of 676,209 units, but PAT -6.4% YoY to Rs 3,659 cr on rising costs. Recommended dividend Rs 140/share. Order backlog ~190,000 (130,000 in small cars); dealer inventory ~12 days. Management guided 10% domestic volume growth for FY27.
stocks.sector_context: Nifty Auto climbed ~3% on Maruti's results, lifting peer sentiment. GST cut in H2 FY26 boosted PV demand. Auto stocks broadly higher today (4-May) with Maruti and Bajaj Auto cited as top picks. Sector remains sensitive to crude and rupee weakness.
stocks.peer_comparison: Outperforming broader auto sector with strongest-ever monthly sales and largest order backlog; peers Tata Motors and M&M positive but Maruti stands out on small-car dominance (130k of 190k pending orders).
red_flags: Q4 PAT -6.4% YoY despite strong revenue - margin pressure from rising costs
Production-capacity constraint capping near-term volume conversion
Auto basket sensitive to crude oil and rupee weakness
catalysts: Order backlog conversion as capacity ramps
FY27 guidance of 10% domestic volume growth

stocks.recent_news: Board meeting on 6-May-2026 (T+2) to approve audited Q4 FY26 and FY26 results and consider final dividend. Street estimates Q4 revenue Rs 3,600-3,900 cr, PAT Rs 290-330 cr; final dividend of Rs 5-7/share expected. Q3 FY26 PAT Rs 285 cr (+7.55% YoY) on sales Rs 4,005 cr (+12.47% YoY). Signed 25-year PPAs for 600 MW wind-solar hybrid (Purvah 300 MW; Vismaya, Hexa, Sprng 100 MW each). Incorporated wholly-owned subsidiary PBTPPL in March-2026 for renewables. Stock around Rs 188 on 27-Apr-2026, near 52W high.
stocks.sector_context: Power sector strongly outperforming - Adani Power, JSW Energy, Tata Power beating Nifty 50 by 10-25 ppt YTD 2026. Hot summer driving expected 8-12% YoY demand growth. CESC among Nuvama's top sector picks; renewable PPA wins are a structural tailwind.
stocks.peer_comparison: Vs Tata Power / NTPC / Torrent Power, CESC trades at lower multiples with higher dividend yield (~3.2%) but smaller renewable footprint - the 600 MW awards and PBTPPL incorporation begin to address that gap. Integrated generation+distribution model insulates from merchant volatility seen at JSW/Tata Power.
red_flags: Stock trading near 52W high heading into results - disappointment could trigger profit-taking
Renewable execution risk on 25-year PPA capex commitments
Concentrated Kolkata distribution exposure relative to diversified peers
catalysts: Summer demand peak driving Q1 FY27 volumes
600 MW wind-solar hybrid execution updates and PBTPPL roadmap
